name: QuicksilverOne Cash Rewards

verdict.text: Same earn rate as the free Quicksilver: graduate once your score allows

earn_rates.category: Hotels, vacation rentals & rental cars, via Capital One Travel

earn_note: Capital One's own comparison page confirms QuicksilverOne earns exactly what the no-fee Quicksilver earns: 1.5% flat plus the same 5% Capital One Travel and Entertainment categories. The entire premium here is credit access (approvals down to fair credit), not a richer rewards rate; there's no sign-up bonus and no intro APR. Like Quicksilver, some accounts are being migrated to the Discover network starting May 2026 with an added 3% at grocery stores and gas stations (opt-out available, affected old cards stopped working July 9, 2026).

redemption_options.method: Statement credit, check, direct deposit, or gift cards

points.note: Same flat 1¢-per-point cash back as Quicksilver, with no minimum redemption and no expiration while the account is open. The $39 annual fee doesn't buy a better rate, only easier approval.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency: straight cash back only.

insurance.detail: Doubles eligible manufacturer warranties of ≤1 yr, up to 24 months total
Up to $1M · when fare is charged to the card

protection_note: Capital One's materials don't call out any protection differences from the no-fee Quicksilver, so treat this as the same standard suite: purchase protection, doubled extended warranty, and price protection, but no trip cancellation, baggage, or medical coverage.
rental_note: Secondary auto rental collision/theft coverage, up to 31 days, pays out after your personal auto policy. Decline the counter's CDW/LDW and charge the entire rental to this card to activate it; excludes luxury/exotic vehicles and business or peer-to-peer rentals.

status_perks.name: Hertz Five Star status
status_perks.note: Skip-the-counter access and a wider vehicle selection at select Hertz locations.

services.name: No intro APR
services.detail: Unlike Quicksilver, there's no 0% introductory period. A variable 28.99% APR applies to purchases, balance transfers, and cash advances from day one.

services.name: Automatic credit line review
services.detail: Capital One automatically considers cardholders for a higher credit line after 6 months of on-time payments, the main reason to hold this card at all.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: Complimentary concierge
services.detail: 24/7, 365-day concierge for dining, entertainment, and travel arrangements.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns cash back on their spend (into your account)
Same purchase protection as the primary card

additional_cards.note: Free to add: useful for building a trusted household member's credit history alongside your own.

timeline.text: Capital One begins mailing Discover-network replacement cards to select Quicksilver and QuicksilverOne accounts, adding an unlimited 3% cash back category at grocery stores and gas stations. Affected old Mastercards stopped working July 9, 2026; the change is opt-out, not universal, and the $39 annual fee is unchanged.
Capital One completes its acquisition of Discover Financial Services, setting up the network migration above.
